challenge.title: Korak 3
challenge.description: Ispod vašeg prvog console.log(), dodajte drugi console.log() da zapamti vrednost promene userInput u konzolu.

hooks.beforeEach:
const spy = __helpers.spyOn(console, 'log');
const getLogs = () => spy.calls.map(call => call?.[0]);

challengeFiles.name: script
challengeFiles.contents:
const userInput = "   Hello World!   ";
console.log("Original input:");

tests.text: Treba da snimiš promene za userInput u konzoli.
